Off Calendar Jan-31-2014 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance nor objection. Court ordered case dismissed. JUDGE CYNTHIA M. LEE; Clerk KCox; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-02-2013 Continued To Nov-06-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Appearance by Johanna Kwasniewski, Esq. for Plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to JUL-30-2013 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610). After hearing, Court ordered matter set for Case Management conference on NOV-06-2013 at 10:30 am in Dept. 610 for status of bankruptcy stay. (The JUL-30-2013 Order to show cause date given at hearing is vacated.)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-14-2013 Continued To Apr-30-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is reset to Apr-30-2013 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)
